doc: Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_ceil: round an MPFR value toward +∞ to an integer at the caller-supplied prec, returning {value, ternary}. No rnd parameter — direction is implicit (toward positive infinity). Behaviour: ceil(2.7)=3, ceil(-2.7)=-2 (less negative), ceil(0.3)=1, ceil(-0.3)=-0 (sign preserved). Sign matters: SIGNED value rounds toward +∞. Class is 'arithmetic'.
divergence_from_c: C mutates rop; TS returns {value, ternary}. Behaviour matches mpfr_rint(r, u, MPFR_RNDU). NaN→NaN; ±Inf→±Inf; ±0→±0 (sign preserved); positive normal with fractional bits→trunc + 1; negative normal→trunc.
refs: mpfr/src/rint.c L333–L336 — mpfr_ceil defers to mpfr_rint(r, u, MPFR_RNDU).
mpfr/src/rint.c L67–L72 — rnd_away = sign>0 for RNDU.
